models.notes: Fill exact limits from official provider docs/account dashboard.
Throughput fallback after Maverick; 30k TPM on free tier.
Quality-first primary (best-of-best mode); lower TPM so faster rotation expected.
Strong quality baseline, lower daily token cap than Scout/Maverick.
Good coding/reasoning quality with high RPM on free tier.
Strong open model fallback for reasoning/coding.
Fast multilingual fallback with generous free daily token cap.
Disabled as weak-tier fallback per user preference; can be re-enabled if needed.
